# Pinned versions and SHA-256 checksums for vendored C/C++ dependencies.
# Update with care — bumping a version requires re-verifying checksums.
#
# Format:  <name> <version> <archive-url> <sha256>

zlib    1.3.1  https://github.com/madler/zlib/releases/download/v1.3.1/zlib-1.3.1.tar.gz                                                        9a93b2b7dfdac77ceba5a558a580e74667dd6fede4585b91eefb60f03b72df23
libpng  1.6.43 https://download.sourceforge.net/libpng/libpng-1.6.43.tar.xz                                                                      6a5ca0652392a2d7c9db2ae5b40210843c0bbc081cbd410825ab00cc59f14a6c
libtiff 4.6.0  https://download.osgeo.org/libtiff/tiff-4.6.0.tar.xz                                                                              e178649607d1e22b51cf361dd20a3753f244f022eefab1f2f218fc62ebaf87d2
lcms2   2.16   https://github.com/mm2/Little-CMS/releases/download/lcms2.16/lcms2-2.16.tar.gz                                                    d873d34ad8b9b4cea010631f1a6228d2087475e4dc5e763eb81acc23d9d45a51
libexpat 2.6.2 https://github.com/libexpat/libexpat/releases/download/R_2_6_2/expat-2.6.2.tar.xz                                                 ee14b4c5d8908b1bec37ad937607eab183d4d9806a08adee472c3c3121d27364
inih    r58    https://github.com/benhoyt/inih/archive/refs/tags/r58.tar.gz                                                                     e79216260d5dffe809bda840be48ab0eec7737b2bb9f02d2275c1b46344ea7b7
